docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GASCON, GEORGE

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MCDOWD, SHEILA AS TO DEFENDANT GASCON, GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: B.PAREDES. NOT REPORTED. (506)
